name: conform-dist-tag-spec
description: Drop-in PM conformance fixture: dist-tag and wildcard declared specs. 'is-odd' is declared as the 'latest' dist-tag and 'is-even' as '*' — both resolve to a concrete version, but every lockfile must serialize the DECLARED spec verbatim (latest / *), not the resolved version. Catches the classic writer re-normalization churn bug.
